chin_hakha.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Na challenge pakhatnak kha a hmaan in leh
chin_hakha.what_number_does_the_arrow_point_to: Arrow nih zei number dah a hmuhsak?
chin_hakha.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Arrow nih a hmuhsakmi value kha ruat (number a naih bik).
chin_hakha.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Marker chiah awkah a cunglei number line kha click.
chin_hakha.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Number line marker. Lengter awkah arrow keys hman, endpoints awkah Home/End, step ngan awkah Shift.
chin_hakha.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Number line — fractions a cunglei, decimals a tanglei
chin_hakha.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Zat a khat, visual 3 aa lawn. Zat cu representation vialte ah a um zungzal.
chin_hakha.this_decimal_repeats_forever: Hi decimal hi zungzal in a leng
chin_hakha.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Marker kha fraction in lengter — line cungah fraction arithmetic
chin_hakha.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: A tanglei i chip kha click. Marker a slide; visual 4 vialte an thleng. Na tlin ahcun line cu amah in a sau deuh.
chin_hakha.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Common-denominator hunter — denominator aa lawnmi fractions telh ning
chin_hakha.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: 1/2 + 1/3 kha directly na telh kho lo. Hmasabik ah denominator pakhat (LCM a ṭha), fraction pakhat cio min thlak, cun numerators telh.
chin_hakha.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Equivalent fractions — point a khat, min tampi. Line ṭhen ṭhan awkah click.
chin_hakha.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: A cunglei LE a tanglei kha number a khat in mul (asiloah then) → value a khat, min aa lawn. Marker a lo lo.
chin_hakha.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Quarter cu $0.25 = dollar 1/4. Dime cu $0.10 = 1/10. Coins cu decimal-fraction practice.
chin_hakha.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Decimal place vialte cu fraction a si. 1st place: tenths, 2nd: hundredths, 3rd: thousandths.
chin_hakha.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Frac Dec tab kha defaults ah reset
chin_hakha.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Zeicah fractions le decimals cu thil a khat an si
chin_hakha.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem: Fraction cu division problem a si.
chin_hakha.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 cu "3 kha 4 in then" tinak a si. Calculator zohzah ah 3 ÷ 4 ṭial: 0.75. Slash le ÷ cu thil a khat an si.
chin_hakha.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Decimal cu denominator thutmi a ngeimi fraction a si.
chin_hakha.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 cu "tenths 6," 6/10 tinak a si. 0.25 cu "hundredths 25," 25/100 tinak a si, cun 1/4 ah a fawi.
chin_hakha.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: 1/4 i point cu 0.25 i point he point a khat an si. Hmun a khat, min pahnih.
chin_hakha.some_terminate_some_repeat: Cheu cu an dih, cheu cu an leng.
chin_hakha.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (a dih). 1/4 = 0.25 (a dih). 1/3 = 0.333… (zungzal in a leng). Denominator nih a khiah: 2 le 5 lawng ah a then khawh ahcun a dih. Asiloah a leng. Decimal card ah ↻ zoh.
chin_hakha.focus_explore_body: Range chiah, markers telh, distances tahchunh.
chin_hakha.focus_challenges_body: Ruatnak, rounding, le values hmuhnak practice.
chin_hakha.focus_frac_body: Fractions, decimals, percents, le area models pehtlaih.
chin_hakha.focus_compare_body: Score um lo in fraction size relationships tuah.
chin_hakha.focus_summary: Line pakhat hman in values hmuh, jumps langhter, le equivalent forms pehtlaih.
chin_hakha.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Zoh — number sense caah zohnak inn
chin_hakha.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Numbers cu line cungah hmun bantuk, symbols lawng si lo. Negatives cu zero kah ah an lang. Fractions cu integers KARLAK ah an um; decimals cu ruahnak a khat nain a tehte deuh. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
chin_hakha.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 cu khoika ah dah a um? −2.4 zong? Ruatnak nih magnitude sense a ser. Studies (Siegler 2009) nih number-line precision nih math success hmailei kha rote facts nakin ṭha deuh in a langhter.
chin_hakha.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Skip Count — the bridge to multiplication
chin_hakha.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = 2 times table a kal. 5 le 10 in skip counting nih money le time a ser cia. 3 in a hnu lei relh nih subtraction le division a ser cia. Line nih rhythm a langhter.
chin_hakha.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Fractions ↔ Decimals, point a khat, min pahnih
chin_hakha.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Fraction cu division problem a si. Decimal cu 10, 100, 1000… denominator thutmi a ngeimi fraction a si. 1/4 le 0.25 cu line cungah hmun A KHAT an si. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
chin_hakha.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Fractions pahnih, relationships 4: a khat, ½ landmark a tawng, A a tomdeuh, asiloah B a tomdeuh. Sliders sawh, na hmuhmi ṭial, na comparison rule ṭial.
chin_hakha.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Fractions pahnih an numerators le denominators thleng. Widget nih relationships 4 chungah pakhat a chimh. Score um lo, reveal um lo — sawh law zoh lawng.
chin_hakha.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Hypothesis (free text): Zeitikah dah fractions pahnih an i khat? Zeitikah dah pakhat cu ½ a naih?
chin_hakha.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Numerators le denominators aa lawn nain a i khatmi fractions pahnih hmuh.
chin_hakha.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Zei nih dah fraction kha ½ a naihter? 1 a naih zong?
chin_hakha.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Zeitikah dah fractions pahnih tahchunh a fawi? Zeitikah dah a har?
chin_hakha.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Ka hngalh — kamah ṭong in chim
chin_hakha.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Decimals ah thleng lo in fractions pahnih tahchunh ning chim.
chin_hakha.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Design note: discrete 4-state outcome; fraction-comparison score um lo; reveal um lo — tinhmi in.
chin_hakha.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tabs | N: challenge thar | ?: AI tutor | ← → marker ah: lengter | Home/End: donghnak
chin_hakha.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: Integers - Absolute value = zero in hlatnak
chin_hakha.integer_lab_summary: Negative numbers focus a si tikah mini lab hong.
chin_hakha.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Zero in hlatnak a langhtermi absolute value number line
